name: Vanquish Soul, Start!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｓｔａｒｔ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スタート</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ｆｏｒ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フォー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＶＳ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヴァンキッシュ・ソウル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>！
desc: You can target 1 "Vanquish Soul" monster you control; add 1 "Vanquish Soul" monster with a different Attribute from your Deck to your hand. If a "Vanquish Soul" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can reveal 1 "Vanquish Soul" monster in your hand instead. During your End Phase, if you control 2 or more "Vanquish Soul" monsters: You can Set 1 "Vanquish Soul" Trap from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Vanquish Soul, Start!" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 "Vanquish Soul" monster you control; add 1 "Vanquish Soul" monster with a different Attribute from your Deck to your hand. If a "Vanquish Soul" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can reveal 1 "Vanquish Soul" monster in your hand instead. During your End Phase, if you control 2 or more "Vanquish Soul" monsters: You can Set 1 "Vanquish Soul" Trap from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Vanquish Soul, Start!" once per turn.

mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
